summary: PII — model inference must run within tenant geo-region
description_md:
PII data must remain within the tenant's geo-region to comply with data sovereignty requirements and avoid cross-border compliance violations.

- Model inference latency must not exceed 200ms when running within the same geo-region as the data source
- Zero PII bytes may traverse geo-region boundaries during inference processing
- Audit log must capture geo-region validation events with timestamp and tenant ID
- Connector must fail gracefully with HTTP 403 if geo-region mismatch is detected
- Workspace admin must be able to configure allowed geo-regions per tenant
